body:
Hey Amara, just following up on our conversation from last week about [Halfway Capital](orgs/halfway-capital) and the potential co-investment opportunity. I wanted to confirm the terms we discussed — our understanding is that a16z would be coming in for roughly 18% of the round, with the total Series A sitting at $14M, closing by end of Q3. We're pretty excited about the deal and want to make sure we're aligned before either of us moves forward with term sheets. Let me know if you have bandwidth for a quick call Thursday or Friday to sync up — I think there are still a few open items worth talking through before we loop in the founders. Happy to defer to your schedule on timing.

— Marcus
